searchCMSContent.activeStatusTooltip: Active refers to properties currently listed for sale or rent.
searchCMSContent.comingSoonStatusTooltip: Coming Soon refers to presale listings that have not yet technically reached the market via a standard multiple listing service. Also known as a Pocket Listing.
searchCMSContent.inContractStatusTooltip: In Contract/Lease Signed indicates an offer has been made and accepted by the seller/landlord, with the deal pending completion.
searchCMSContent.autocompletePlaceholder: Enter a location, address, ZIP or property ID
searchCMSContent.autocompleteNoResults: There are no results, you can try for something more specific like Zipcode, Neighborhood, Building Name, Listing Id

metadataPage.title: New York City Homes for Rent | Rentals | Corcoran
metadataPage.description: Real estate company featuring thousands of properties in New York City for rent. Visit our site to search luxury homes, apartments & townhouse rentals.

adCardCMSContent.title: Finding your perfect home is about to get a whole lot easier.
adCardCMSContent.subtitle: Enter your target location, price range, and preferred amenities, and Corcoran.com’s smart search will find your just-right matches.
adCardCMSContent.imageAltText: Finding your perfect home is about to get a whole lot easier.
